narrative:
Beavercreek 014 (precinct in Greene County) has 852 registered voters, with 44.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.9 percentage points.
